title: Fix tasks.html to flat recency sort

log.context: Fix tasks.html to flat recency sort

Done. Here's the summary:

**Before:** Tasks were bucketed into four status groups (failed → stale → in_progress → done) and rendered as separate labeled sections in that fixed priority order. Only `in_progress` tasks were sorted by recency within their bucket; the other buckets were unsorted.

**After:** All tasks are sorted into a single flat list by last activity timestamp descending — no buckets, no section headers. The existing status filter pills still work; when a filter is active, the fl...(truncated)
